code: import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import"./ViewByRole.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ViewByRole(){const[designations,setDesignations]=useState([]);const[selectedDesignation,setSelectedDesignation]=useState("");/* LOAD DESIGNATIONS FROM BACKEND */useEffect(()=>{loadDesignations();},[]);const loadDesignations=async()=>{try{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");const response=await fetch("http://localhost:8080/api/designations",{headers:{"Authorization":"Bearer "+token}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Failed to load designations");const data=await response.json();setDesignations(data);}catch(error){console.error(error);alert("Error loading designations");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"view-role-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"View Employees By Designation"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:selectedDesignation,onChange:e=>setSelectedDesignation(e.target.value),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"",children:"Select Designation"}),designations.map(d=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:d.title,children:d.title},d.id))]})]});}export default ViewByRole;
